home.hero: Instantly know if you need a permit, how long it will take, and what participation your municipality requires.
home.subhero: Built for Dutch real estate developers navigating the Omgevingswet.
home.permit_check_desc: Direct integration with the official Omgevingsloket — instantly know if you need a permit.
home.timeline_desc: Municipality-specific estimates based on real processing data. Plan your financing with confidence.
home.participation_desc: Clear, actionable steps for your specific municipality. Download ready-to-use participation templates.
